playbook.intent: Open backlog of mixed maturity → top-of-backlog spec-ready (AC + complexity tag) each week in 1 hour.
playbook.scope: Weekly 1-hour grooming session: PM brings business priorities, tech lead brings tech-debt + capacity reality. Goal: only the top of the backlog is spec-ready (acceptance criteria + estimated complexity), everything else stays untouched. AI agent splits oversized items into sub-tasks. Tech-debt has a fixed slot quota per cycle. Session ends with a written grooming-decisions log.

success-criteria.criterion: Top of backlog spec-ready (AC + complexity tag)

stage.name: Walk the backlog

tasks.task: Tag each item: spec-ready / needs-AC / oversized / on-hold

stage.decision-gate: Advance once every top-N item has a maturity tag. Don't groom below the line — that's pretend-work.

stage.name: Make spec-ready
stage.intent: Top-of-backlog items become spec-ready: AC + complexity tag.

outputs.output: Spec-ready items at top of backlog

stage.decision-gate: Advance when each spec-ready item has AC + complexity tag. Don't promote anything without both.

stage.name: Balance the slate + log decisions
stage.intent: Honour tech-debt quota; write grooming-decisions log.

tasks.task: Confirm tech-debt slot quota for the coming cycle
Note any candidate that was demoted + why

stage.decision-gate: Required: written log. Verbal-only grooming guarantees next week's session repeats the same arguments.

extra.value: [Sprint planning — see sprint-planning-sdd-task-expansion, Quarter-level prioritisation — see quarter-planning-okr-reset, Day-to-day triage — see daily-standup-ai-prebrief]
[Backlog exists with at least 10 items beyond current sprint, Tech-debt register tagged in tracker, AI agent able to propose task splits from spec]

[Grooming below the line — wastes session on items nobody will pick up, Tech-debt quota slips — accumulates into a quarter-end crisis, Oversized items left whole — sprint planning blocks on them, Decisions stay verbal — same debates repeat weekly]
['Can a dev claim the top item and start without re-asking what ''done'' means?', 'Did we close at least one tech-debt slot this week?', 'Did the session end in 1 hour?']

{human: faion get-content backlog-grooming-pm-tech-lead --format md, agent: faion get-content backlog-grooming-pm-tech-lead --format context, json: faion get-content backlog-grooming-pm-tech-lead --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P6 product-dev team persona}]
